title: The League And Covenant.
content:
The solemn League and Covenant
            Cost Scotland blood, cost Scotland tears;
        But it sealed freedom's sacred cause,
            If thou'rt a slave, indulge thy sneers.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The League And Covenant."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
